title: Gérard M. Baudet
text: Home * People * Gérard M. Baudet Gérard M. Baudet [1] Gérard M. Baudet , a French computer scientist and associate professor at the Department of Computer Science and Statistics, University of Rhode Island , previously affiliated with the French National Institute for Research in Computer Science and Control (INRIA) in Paris-Rocquencourt . He holds a Ph.D. from Carnegie Mellon University in 1978 on The Design and Analysis of Algorithms for Asynchronous Multiprocessors [2] , and researched on Alpha-Beta and Parallel Search .
